prompt: A send-money flow: pick one of my saved payees, enter an amount and a note, review the details, then send it from checking.
wire:
export default function SendMoneyFlow() { const [step, setStep] = React.useState<"pick"|"amount"|"review"|"done"|"pending">("pick"); const [payees, setPayees] = React.useState([]); const [selectedPayee, setSelectedPayee] = React.useState(null); const [amount, setAmount] = React.useState(""); const [memo, setMemo] = React.useState(""); const [error, setError] = React.useState(""); const [loading, setLoading] = React.useState(false); React.useEffect(() => { tools.host_listPayees({}).then((res: any) => { setPayees(res.data || res.payees || res || []); }); }, []); const amountCents = Math.round(parseFloat(amount || "0") * 100); function handlePickPayee(p: any) { setSelectedPayee(p); setStep("amount"); setError(""); } function handleAmountNext() { if (!amount || isNaN(parseFloat(amount)) || parseFloat(amount) <= 0) { setError("Please enter a valid amount."); return; } setError(""); setStep("review"); } async function handleSend() { setLoading(true); setError(""); try { const res = await tools.host_transferMoney({ amount: amountCents, recipient_name: selectedPayee.name || selectedPayee.label || selectedPayee.payeeName || "", memo: memo || "" }); if (res && res.status === "pending-approval") { setStep("pending"); } else { setStep("done"); } } catch (e: any) { setError("Transfer failed. Please try again."); } finally { setLoading(false); } } function reset() { setStep("pick"); setSelectedPayee(null); setAmount(""); setMemo(""); setError(""); } const containerStyle: React.CSSProperties = { maxWidth: 480, margin: "0 auto", padding: "32px 16px", fontFamily: "var(--vendo-font-family)", color: "var(--vendo-color-text)", }; const surfaceStyle: React.CSSProperties = { background: "var(--vendo-color-surface)", border: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-medium)", padding: "28px 24px", }; const labelStyle: React.CSSProperties = { fontSize: 12, color: "var(--vendo-color-muted)", textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: "0.06em", marginBottom: 12, fontWeight: 600, }; const headingStyle: React.CSSProperties = { fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 20, fontFamily: "var(--vendo-heading-family, var(--vendo-font-family))", }; const inputStyle: React.CSSProperties = { width: "100%", padding: "10px 12px", border: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-small)", fontSize: 15, fontFamily: "var(--vendo-font-family)", color: "var(--vendo-color-text)", background: "var(--vendo-color-surface)", boxSizing: "border-box", outline: "none", }; const primaryBtn: React.CSSProperties = { background: "var(--vendo-color-accent)", color: "var(--vendo-color-accent-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-small)", padding: "11px 24px", fontSize: 15, fontWeight: 600, cursor: "pointer", width: "100%", marginTop: 8, }; const ghostBtn: React.CSSProperties = { background: "transparent", color: "var(--vendo-color-muted)", border: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-small)", padding: "10px 24px", fontSize: 15, fontWeight: 500, cursor: "pointer", width: "100%", marginTop: 8, }; const payeeRowStyle: React.CSSProperties = { display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 12, padding: "12px 14px", border: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-small)", cursor: "pointer", marginBottom: 8, background: "var(--vendo-color-surface)", transition: "border-color 0.15s", }; const avatarStyle: React.CSSProperties = { width: 38, height: 38, borderRadius: "50%", background: "var(--vendo-color-accent)", color: "var(--vendo-color-accent-text)", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 15, flexShrink: 0, }; const rowDetailStyle: React.CSSProperties = { display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 2, }; const reviewRowStyle: React.CSSProperties = { display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", padding: "10px 0", borderBottom: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", }; const reviewLabelStyle: React.CSSProperties = { fontSize: 13, color: "var(--vendo-color-muted)", }; const reviewValueStyle: React.CSSProperties = { fontSize: 15, fontWeight: 500, }; function getInitials(p: any) { const name = p.name || p.label || p.payeeName || "?"; return name.split(" ").map((w: string) => w[0]).join("").slice(0, 2).toUpperCase(); } function getPayeeName(p: any) { return p.name || p.label || p.payeeName || "Unknown"; } function getPayeeDetail(p: any) { return p.accountNumber ? `···${String(p.accountNumber).slice(-4)}` : p.bank || p.email || p.type || ""; } if (step === "done") { return (
✓
Transfer sent
{fmt.money(amountCents)} to {getPayeeName(selectedPayee)}
{memo ?
"{memo}"
: null}
); } if (step === "pending") { return (

handlePickPayee(p)} onMouseEnter={(e: React.MouseEvent) => (e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = "var(--vendo-color-accent)")} onMouseLeave={(e: React.MouseEvent) => (e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = "var(--vendo-color-border)")} >
